Off Calendar Jun-27-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion for Order changing Sanction Award issued on 3/18/2002 to Maryann Dressner, Esq., in the amount of $350.00, is scheduled today, there being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted.
